query:
-- 先刪除測試客戶相關的 assignments
DELETE assignments FROM assignments
INNER JOIN demands ON assignments.demandId = demands.id
INNER JOIN clients ON demands.clientId = clients.id
WHERE clients.name LIKE '%測試%' OR clients.name LIKE '%TEST%';

-- 再刪除測試客戶相關的 demands
DELETE demands FROM demands
INNER JOIN clients ON demands.clientId = clients.id
WHERE clients.name LIKE '%測試%' OR clients.name LIKE '%TEST%';

-- 最後刪除測試客戶
DELETE FROM clients WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%';

-- 刪除測試員工相關的 assignments
DELETE assignments FROM assignments
INNER JOIN workers ON assignments.workerId = workers.id
WHERE workers.name LIKE '%測試%' OR workers.name LIKE '%TEST%';

-- 刪除測試員工
DELETE FROM workers WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%';
